イベントID(もしくは名称) = 1F_Orig
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = 1F_Orig
現在天候のコモンイベント実行

When I held a position in the kingdom dealing with monster countermeasures, as part
of my duties, I collected literature on monsters from all over the country. Now that
they are no longer needed, they have come into my possession.

Th-this is all books about monsters!? The Royal City library didn't even have this
many...!

...... As you are aware, for about a year now, monster activity has shown an extreme
decline.

The unexplained weakening of monsters, and the subsequent end of the war with the
demon clan, led the Kingdom's army to downsize, and these materials were discarded.

Even so, though their numbers have decreased, monsters are still running rampant in
various regions. For adventurers like you, the information here should be useful.
Y-yes... Having information would be helpful... ......But

...I don't have the luxury for that right now. To save Elly, I need money... Money is
more important right now...

Here, there are also investigation records on monsters that I personally wrote. They
are special items you can only see here. An adventurer should appreciate them.
Well then, I'll take my leave. I hope these books will be of help to you.
...Well, I'll just drop by when I have time. We don't have any time left...
It's locked solid. Doesn't look like you can get in here...

...Hmm, that's about it! Is there anything else you'd like to ask? Please, ask me
anything! I've got plenty of time!
Ah, \n[1]-san! Welcome! If you need anything, just say the word!

Welcome to the Duke's archive! It's rare for him to let anyone in here...! I finally
get to talk to someone after so long! Ugh...!
I'd like to apply for a job

Now then... an explanation about this archive... *ahem*! This archive stores all
kinds of books related to monsters.

The Duke, who was once the Supreme Commander of the Kingdom's army, gathered these
from all over the world to aid in the nation's defense. They're truly a national
treasure!

...That said, with the recent decline in monsters, both the Duke's work and the
purpose of these books have become obsolete...

But this place still has an important role: to pass down knowledge of monster
ecosystems that can no longer be seen to future generations! That's why I continue as
the librarian here! ...And the job is easy too.

Ah, but... if you have some free time... I'd be happy if you could chat with me for
just a bit... It gets lonely by myself...

Well, it's mostly books about monsters. Things like survey reports on where and what
kinds of monsters were found, or compilations of monster ecosystems...

Oh! But be careful! Some of the books were written by the Duke himself... and their
contents are a bit, well, outlandish...

He seriously writes hypotheses like 'the reason for the monster decline is because
the Demon King, the pinnacle of the demon race, disappeared...!' It makes no sense!
...But he's my employer, so I have to keep that book here!

That kind of talk is pure fantasy! The demon race, which is a general term for many
species, couldn't possibly unite under one banner! Could a dragon and a goblin ever
get along? I ask you!?

Hmm, the Demon King... What is that? Even though I've never heard the term before,
somehow... I feel like I know of its existence...
A book written by the lord... Maybe I should look into it...
Thank you! Well then, let's chat again sometime!

...I got roped into another long talk with the librarian... Getting paid just for
this feels kind of wrong...

Eh! Really? That's a huge help~! I was just looking for someone to chat with―*ahem*!
I mean, someone to help organize the books!
Okay then, here! Have a seat! I'll teach you everything from the beginning!

...I was subjected to the librarian's endless monologue... Is... is this really
considered work?

...Phew, that was fun! It feels like it's been ages since I talked to a boy around my
age~...! Very satisfying, very satisfying! Here, your pay!
// ラストイベント＝6本読みの後

...Hmm, that's about it! Is there anything else you'd like to ask? Please, ask me
anything! I've got plenty of time!
Oh? What is it, \n[1]-san? Do you have something you want to ask me?
I'd like to apply for a job
I'd like to speak with the lord

Well then... an explanation about this archive... *ahem*! This archive stores all
kinds of books related to monsters.

They were gathered from all over the world by the Duke, who was the Supreme Commander
of the Kingdom's army, for the sake of national defense. They're truly a national
treasure!

...That said, with the recent decline in monsters, both the Duke's work and the role
of these books have become unnecessary...

But this place has the important role of passing down knowledge of monster ecosystems
that can no longer be seen to future generations! That's why I continue as the
librarian here! ...And the work is easy.

Ah, but... if you have some free time... I'd be happy if you could chat with me for
just a little while... It gets lonely by myself...

Well, it's mostly books about monsters. Things like survey reports on where and what
kinds of monsters were found, or compilations of monster ecosystems...

Ah! But be careful! Some of the books were written by the Duke-sama himself... but
the contents are a bit, how should I say... outlandish...

He seriously wrote hypotheses that make no sense, like the reason for the monster
decline is because the Demon King, the pinnacle of the demon race, disappeared...!
...He's my employer, so I have no choice but to keep that book here!

That kind of talk is pure fantasy! There's no way the demon race, which is a
collective term for many species, could unite as one! Can you imagine a dragon and a
goblin getting along? Right!?

I tried reading that book, but something still bothers me... If the lord wrote that
book, I'd like to hear it directly from him...
Thank you! Well then, let's chat together again sometime!

...I got roped into another long talk with the librarian... Getting paid just for
this makes me feel kind of guilty...

Eh! Really? That's a huge help~! I was just looking for someone to chat with...
*ahem*! I mean, to help organize the books!
Okay then, here! Have a seat! I'll teach you everything from the beginning!

...... I was forced to endure the librarian's endless chatter... I-is this really
considered work?

...Phew, that was fun! It feels like it's been forever since I talked to a boy around
my age~...! Satisfied, satisfied! Here, your pay!

Eh, you want to meet the Duke-sama...? Considering his health, that might be
difficult right now... By the way, what's it about?

Ah, no... It's just, after reading that book about the Demon King, there was
something that bothered me, so I thought I'd like to hear it directly from the
lord...

...Ah, that kind of talk. Then it's fine! When it comes to that Demon King or
whatever, he's always very welcoming, apparently!

He's been telling me that ever since I was assigned here...! If someone reads his
book and says they want to talk to the Duke-sama about it... here you go! He said to
give them this key!

It's the key to the Duke-sama's private room in the back, I think! I'm too awestruck
to go near it, so I'm not sure... But apparently it's a room at the back of this
archive!

You're the first person to be interested in such an eccentric story! I'm sure the
Duke-sama will be delighted! Please, do keep him company!

...Hmm, that's about it! Is there anything else you'd like to ask? Please, ask me
anything! I've got plenty of time!
Ah, \n[1]-san! Welcome! If you need anything, just say the word!
I'd like to apply for a job

Now then... an explanation about this archive... *ahem*! This archive stores all
manner of books concerning monsters.

They were gathered from all over the world by the Duke, who was the Supreme Commander
of the Kingdom's Army, to aid in the nation's defense. Truly, this collection is a
national treasure!

...That said, with the recent decline in monsters, both the Duke's work and the role
of these books have become obsolete...

But this place has an important role: to pass down knowledge of monster ecosystems,
which can no longer be seen, to future generations! That's why I continue as the
librarian here! ......And the work is easy.

Ah, but... if you happen to have some free time... I'd be happy if you could chat
with me for just a little while... It gets lonely by myself......

Well, it's mostly books about monsters. Investigation reports on where and what kinds
of monsters were found, compilations of monster ecosystems, that sort of thing...

Why on earth would they include stories about the Demon King among such academically
important texts... I simply cannot fathom the Duke-sama's thinking!
Thank you! Well then, let's chat again sometime!

...I got roped into another long talk with the librarian... Getting paid just for
this makes me feel kinda guilty...

Eh! Really? That's a huge help~! I was just looking for someone to chat with―*ahem*!
I mean, someone to help organize the books!
Okay then, here! Have a seat! I'll teach you everything from the beginning!

...... I was subjected to the librarian's endless monologue... I-is this really
considered work?

...Phew, that was fun! It feels like it's been ages since I talked to a boy around my
age~...! Very satisfying, very satisfying! Here, your money!

Excuse me, sir! This duke's archive is off-limits to all but a select few! Now,
please leave!

...Most of them are books summarizing the ecology of monsters. It's all numbers and
technical terms, my eyes are glazing over...

...It's a book compiling monster sightings in this region... Huh, so there have even
been dragons around here...

Hmm, I found a few interesting stories, but the rest is pretty ordinary... Just stuff
about goblins and slimes appearing.

...There's no mention anywhere of that strange monster Mana and I defeated a year
ago... It was so strong, yet there's no information... Huh, what...?

Part of the book is torn... I wonder why... It's an old book, maybe it just
deteriorated? W-well, whatever... I should stop reading so I don't accidentally
damage it further.

イベントID(もしくは名称) = Fl_Bookshelf02
...It's a book about the magic used by monsters, about curses.

A long time ago, Mana taught me about this too... Something about how the sorcery
monsters use is different from the magic of mages like Mana, and it's activated using
hatred or resentment towards people, or something like that...

........This book says something similar... Huh? "...There is evidence that curse
techniques were once used even by humans without magical power, and similar curses
have been passed down even in remote villages."

"Even humans without magical power can cause phenomena similar to magic using special
rituals or prayers to ancestral spirits. Curses were a primitive form of magic before
sorcery was systematized."

...So the ritual the Village Chief was performing... Did that cause the curse? Is
that why Elly can't leave the village...?

イベントID(もしくは名称) = Fl_Bookshelf03

...! This is the Hero-sama's Fairy Tale series! They even have something like this as
reference material...!

A thousand years ago, before the Kingdom was founded... It's the story of how
Hero-sama traveled to various places to help people being attacked by rampaging
monsters.

In the end, he defeats a giant dragon as big as a mountain and builds the Millennium
Kingdom that still stands today on that land... It's a bestseller that became this
Kingdom's founding myth!

...It's true there are lots of monsters in the book, but I can't imagine this being
used as monster reference material... Maybe the lord-sama is a fan of the Hero too?

イベントID(もしくは名称) = Fl_Bookshelf04

... This looks like a recent research book about monsters. It's not too difficult, so
even I can read it...

"...Monsters seem to be a general term for species that do not become attached to
humans. Since the dawn of history, humans and monsters have clashed repeatedly. Their
hatred for us has never ceased..."

"That premise collapsed silently the other day. In the numerous monster attack zones
that existed around the Royal City, reports of encounters and battles with monsters
simultaneously dropped to zero."

"Even the scouts from the Adventurer's Guild were astonished. Goblins and slimes,
upon seeing humans, would no longer attack, but instead slowly walk away or stare at
us curiously..."

"I have no idea how to interpret this great upheaval. For a wide variety of monsters
to simultaneously cease their hostility towards us... not even the believers of the
Hero's Church could have imagined it."

...Well, that's right. From a year ago until now, the damage inflicted on humans by
weak monsters has become nonexistent. Monsters that would attack Elly like in the old
days no longer exist around here.

But, the strong monsters are still hostile towards humans... and in the regions where
those bastards inhabit, someone's help is still needed. ...Our work as adventurers
continues uninterrupted........

イベントID(もしくは名称) = Fl_Bookshelf05

...Is this the book the librarian was talking about? The Demon King, the leader of
the monsters... The author's name isn't written, but this is probably it......

"No scholar has been able to pinpoint the reason why the monsters suddenly became
docile... Why is that? It's because the very word that signifies it has been lost
from them."

"The Demon King... The wielder of immense magical power who commanded all demonkind.
The root of the curse that planted humanity's hatred into the monsters."

"Using god-like magic to transform the world, then erasing himself... the lonely
king. Let us assume such a being existed."

"The weak and lowly monsters forgot their king's existence, lost their hostility
towards humans, succumbed to their own survival instincts, and ceased their conflict
with mankind."

"The strong and noble monsters still hold loyalty to their king, never losing sight
of themselves, and continue their hostility towards humanity. That may very well be
the truth of the peace we enjoy..."
...... What is this? What's a Demon King? Erasing himself... what does that mean...?

...But, I wonder why. I can't just accept this as someone's delusion... ...Somehow, I
feel like I've heard these words somewhere before......

Even for Elly's sake, I shouldn't be doing this... But I can't help being curious
about the Demon King... ...I wonder if I could talk to the lord about this book......
